title: AuditEvent
description: Immutable record of a consequential Bridgeline action with actor, timestamp, changed values, and supporting evidence.

event_id.description: UUID uniquely identifying this append-only audit event.

event_type.description: Lowercase dotted action name, such as iep.approved or brief.confirmed, used for typed event routing.

occurred_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z when the audited action occurred.

summary.description: Human-readable factual summary of the action suitable for the compliance timeline.

actor.description: Human or system identity responsible for the audited action.

subject.description: Primary domain record affected by the audited action.

changes.description: Field-level before-and-after values needed to reconstruct what changed without mutating prior events.

evidence.description: Source records and citations that substantiate the audited action or state transition.

correlation_id.description: UUID grouping multiple audit events produced by one user operation, or null when no grouping applies.

run_id.description: Pipeline run UUID that caused this action, or null for actions outside a pipeline run.

actor_ref.description: District identifier of the responsible human, or the literal system identity for automated actions.

actor_role.description: Authorized role under which the actor performed the audited action.

subject_type.description: Domain type of the affected record, such as iep_record, obligation, brief, or pipeline_run.

subject_ref.description: Stable identifier of the affected domain record.

field_path.description: JSON-path-like location of the field affected by this change.

previous_value.description: Typed JSON value before the action, or null when the field did not previously exist.

new_value.description: Typed JSON value after the action, or null when the field was removed.

evidence_type.description: Controlled category identifying the kind of evidence that supports the audited action.

evidence_ref.description: Stable identifier or citation key used to retrieve the supporting evidence.

locator.description: Page, row, section, or other precise location within the evidence, or null when the reference is already exact.

NullableJsonValue.description: JSON-compatible scalar, array, object, or null retained as the exact audited field value.
